html:
2026-0609
2026-06-12ESDCOld Age Security ActRegulations Amending the Old Age Security Regulations (Miscellaneous Program)Regulations Amending the Old Age Security Regulations (Miscellaneous Program) in order to introduces amendments which will allow for payments under the Guaranteed Income Supplement (GIS), allowance for the Survivor top-up provisions to be rounded in the same way as the Old Age Security (OAS) pension and GIS, i.e., rounding down if the third decimal is 4 or less and rounding up if it is 5 or more.Registration: SOR/2026-0129 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Old Age Security Regulations (Miscellaneous Program)
precis: Regulations Amending the Old Age Security Regulations (Miscellaneous Program) in order to introduces amendments which will allow for payments under the Guaranteed Income Supplement (GIS), allowance for the Survivor top-up provisions to be rounded in the same way as the Old Age Security (OAS) pension and GIS, i.e., rounding down if the third decimal is 4 or less and rounding up if it is 5 or more.
